creator: dnelson@allantgroup.com
text:
Comment on attachment 155883
sox_14.4.2.diff

(In reply to takefu from comment #8)

Saving a whole 4392 bytes :)

# find . -name libsox.so.3.0.0 -ls
164562     1216 -rwxr-xr-x    1 root  wheel 581992 Apr 23 09:41 ./work/sox-14.4.2/src/.libs/libsox.so.3.0.0
165201     1216 -rwxr-xr-x    1 root  wheel 577600 Apr 23 09:41 ./work/stage/usr/local/lib/libsox.so.3.0.0
# echo $((581992-577600))
4392

But it is a savings, so we might as well use it.
